name: Papaya-Habanero Hot Sauce with Passion
recipeIngredient: 1 (1-inch) length fresh gingerroot, peeled and coarsely chopped
mustard and curry powder - see notes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out the papaya flesh.
2. Combine with remaining ingredients in a food processor.
3. Puree until smooth.
4. Pour mixture into a nonreactive saucepan.
5. Heat gently until just boiling.
6. Remove from heat, let cool completely.
7. Bottle for storage.
Words from a bottle of Hot Sauce with Passion:
"Carefully blended with vinegar, habaneros, papaya, onion, honey, ginger,
garlic, mustard and spices. No salt. 100% natural. ... Manufactured for
Dave's Gourmet, Inc."
Words from Dave's Page on the Internet:
"Habanero heat with a kiss of sweetness, combined with mustard and curry
overtones make this heart warming sauce a favorite."
